name: Notion

composio_registry_match.name: Notion
composio_registry_match.description: Notion centralizes notes, docs, wikis, and tasks in a unified workspace, letting teams build custom workflows for collaboration and knowledge management

description: A connected workspace for wiki, docs, and project management, allowing teams to collaborate and organize information.
notes: Notion has a highly mature REST API supporting OAuth 2.0 and API keys (Internal integrations / Personal Access Tokens). Community MCP servers exist for Notion.
